title: cephalomanes caudatum
intro: Cephalomanes caudatum, also known as the tailless spleenwort or caudatum spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cephalomanes caudatum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
